title: teenage_prompts
prompts: A slightly grainy 2016 smartphone photo, no timestamps or digital overlays, create an image of this woman as a teenager maintaining her exact facial features. Tight focus on her tired, slightly bloated face as she eats cereal in a suburban kitchen, wearing a faded Abercrombie hoodie.
